charlatan v0.4.1.92
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Contributing to charlatan
  • Changelog

Create numbers

Source: R/numerics.R
numerics.Rd

Create numbers

ch_double(n = 1, mean = 0, sd = 1)

ch_integer(n = 1, min = 1, max = 1000)

ch_unif(n = 1, min = 0, max = 9999)

ch_norm(n = 1, mean = 0, sd = 1)

ch_lnorm(n = 1, mean = 0, sd = 1)

ch_beta(n = 1, shape1, shape2, ncp = 0)

Arguments

n

(integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer
mean

mean value
sd

standard deviation
min

minimum value
max

maximum value
shape1, shape2

non-negative parameters of the Beta distribution
ncp

non-centrality parameter

Examples

ch_double()

#> [1] 0.4701256
ch_double(10)

#>  [1]  0.8967006 -1.6278748 -0.2758528  0.3370726 -3.2437327  0.7695849
#>  [7] -1.3241260 -0.6475511 -0.3113932  0.9303039
ch_double(100)

#>   [1] -0.157334608  1.762503330  0.137897373 -0.878571648  0.806395522
#>   [6]  1.891840271  0.831201281  0.184787932 -0.558487429 -0.372011590
#>  [11]  1.464379806  1.104440432  0.579015057  0.801201540  0.634023313
#>  [16]  0.359579287 -0.634979725  0.137002258  2.084380662 -2.216905534
#>  [21] -0.114702919 -0.500486476  0.531701271  0.381750099 -1.490848919
#>  [26]  1.134066912 -2.027154648  1.424868784 -2.035290849  2.682138492
#>  [31] -1.320331165 -1.294559520  0.507761298 -1.256398405  0.447646130
#>  [36]  1.314461777 -0.114868298  1.070411600  0.806687440 -1.046216792
#>  [41]  2.316206317 -1.906134706 -0.059940146 -0.129135640 -2.030813453
#>  [46] -0.137211568 -0.990060023  0.120183986  0.928492049 -1.027247559
#>  [51]  0.620818425  0.813580941 -0.311192883  0.470838982 -0.145394647
#>  [56]  1.559988088 -1.019771699  0.686436079 -0.008313308  1.577691430
#>  [61]  0.112766908  0.485433736  0.320858981 -0.460389519 -0.794290752
#>  [66] -0.700693763  0.725041199 -1.485579380 -0.308060658  0.155815328
#>  [71]  0.372156917 -0.778142724 -0.128794133  0.804675116 -0.435701714
#>  [76]  0.761535175  1.642175927  0.397207952 -0.358493741 -1.566607649
#>  [81] -0.396199389  0.010135387  0.176861858 -2.035489026 -1.730522978
#>  [86] -0.230453052  1.081344445  0.094768611 -0.285128401  0.890108503
#>  [91] -1.447493043 -0.690075718  0.690113824  1.302183992  0.450668868
#>  [96] -0.909118593  1.029612432  1.305561211 -0.765712106  0.729967703

ch_integer()

#> [1] 83
ch_integer(10)

#>  [1]  73 325 403 678 923 751 806 653 645 828
ch_integer(100)

#>   [1] 191 814 266 531 769 822 643   7  28 602 835 322  60 939  21 891 967 648
#>  [19] 753 829 586 121 278 713 818 106 171  16 441 736 478 931 543 582 634 943
#>  [37]  82 751 798 462 162 115 710 958 562 812 318 804 798 245 616 713 477 710
#>  [55] 289 525 680 252 404 806 929 311 431 511 162 760 626 380  70 169 498 266
#>  [73] 662 290 169 626 345 914 286 416 641 350 639 965 260 286  85 810 935 175
#>  [91] 220 726 464 172 426 931 651 684 538 648

ch_unif()

#> [1] 6708.317
ch_norm()

#> [1] 0.9398629
ch_lnorm()

#> [1] 0.9830933
ch_beta(shape1 = 1, shape2 = 1)

#> [1] 0.08268638
